# Ultima IV dungeon: abyss
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  92  room_2
#   &  94  room_4
#   '  a0  altar
#   (  a1  altar_1
#   )  a2  altar_2
#   *  b0  door_special
#   +  c0  kind_c
#   ,  d0  door
#   -  d1  door_1
#   .  d2  door_2
#   /  d3  door_3
#   0  d4  door_4
#   1  d5  door_5
#   2  d6  door_6
#   3  d7  door_7
#   4  d8  door_8
#   5  d9  door_9
#   6  da  door_a
#   7  db  door_b
#   8  dc  door_c
#   9  dd  door_d
#   :  de  door_e
#   ;  df  door_f
#   <  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F!~~~,-.|
|FFFFFFF/|
|~~F&~~F~|
|F~F~~~FF|
|F0F~~*~~|
|F1F~~~~~|
|F23~~~~&|
== level 1 ==
|FFFFFFF~|
|F$~~~~~~|
|F~F<FFFF|
|F~<''''*|
|F~F'FFFF|
|F~F'F!45|
|F~F'F678|
|~~F*F9:;|
== level 2 ==
|F~FFFFFF|
|~!~~~~~~|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~F(~,~!|
|F~F~F-F~|
|F~F23*/.|
|F~F~F1F~|
|F~F!~0~(|
== level 3 ==
|FFF)F6F~|
|F*:;F7F~|
|F9FFFFF~|
|)8F<~~~~|
|FFF<FFFF|
|~~~<F!<~|
|FFFFF4FF|
|~~~~F5F~|
== level 4 ==
|FFFFFFF~|
|F!~~~~F~|
|F~&F%~F~|
|F~FFF~F*|
|F~%F&~FF|
|F~~~~~,F|
|FFFFF-./|
|~~~*FF0~|
== level 5 ==
|FFF~FFFF|
|F~~~~~+F|
|F~<12~FF|
|~~345~F!|
|F~6789FF|
|F~~~:;~+|
|F+FFF~*~|
|FFF!F+~+|
== level 6 ==
|FFFF~~~~|
|F*~FF~+~|
|F~/~FF~~|
|FF~.~FFF|
|~FF~-~FF|
|~~FF~,~F|
|~+~FF~!~|
|~~~FFF~+|
== level 7 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F!~~F~~~|
|F~F~F~F~|
|F~~~01F~|
|FFF234F~|
|F~~56FF7|
|F~FFFF89|
|F~~~~:;*|
